description:
Recto: Memorial list in Hebrew. Interesting layout, resembling a family tree (e.g. Meshullam's three sons each get a small column, and their own sons go underneath their name). 

Verso: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Mentioning items such as sumac, lemon, potash, and sesame.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בHUC.
